free_text: The angular distribution of electrons and positrons at
pair production on nucleus C-12.
English translation of IZV,44,(11),2371,1980.
The angular distributions of electrons and positrons
have been measured for pair production on C-12.
Statistical errors only.
By Yu.A.Novikov.
The data in form of the tables were received
from the authors.
